Masculine Energy
Grows by challenge
Needs appreciation and admiration
Man’s perception of woman changes from thinking she’s
making crazy demands to realizing that “all she needs is to
know how much I love her.”

-- 2 of 11 --

Feminine Energy
Tony explains the voices that the wife hears about needs of
others and everything which needs to get done.
She needs real appreciation and admiration.
Talk about primal need to be taken care of even if you don’t
need a man.

-- 3 of 11 --

Heart Meditation
Couple faces each other
Talk about stress vs. peak performance
Watch heart rate during these modes- stress or peak
performance (this provides strong visual of heart)
Love- equated with peak performance
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 11 --

Breath into heart
Ask couple to find three things you are grateful for.
(Man) Stand with certainty, determination. Say something with
certainty. Say something with joy.
(Woman) How do you feel when he does this?
Tell him all he has to do to effect her is to be in this state.
(Man) What is a word of phrase for you to go into this state?
(Man) Say it, then feel it.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 11 --

Wife Comes at him
Man’s job is to tell himself again and again they will get through
this.
Tony whispers into his ear secret instructions.
Hard for the wife to get into the state of blaming when the man
has presence.
Man- Go back into insecure/demanding state out of presence.
Tony whispers into wife’s ear.
Man- Says his demands and complaints about wife.
Coach- ask for more intensity if necessary. Remind wife of state
and thoughts.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 11 --

Man complains to wife
Man makes demands with more intensity.
Woman laughs, man says he feels her love.
Coach takes woman back into her presence of giving love.
Couple works in silence.
Coach asks what has happened.
Woman answers she feels calmed down and has hope that it will work.
Man feels love.
Coach repeats no going back put what you feel into the present
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 11 --

Purpose
Man and Woman feel love even when they are saying negative things.
Woman realizes she has to make him feel appreciated.
Then he won’t feel depressed.
Man has learned he needs to praise her in the present moment.
Coach- reinforces how much woman is doing.
Coach- explains make him laugh to break his pattern. All she needs is love and
reassurance.
What is your promise to her?
What is your promise to him?
How will kids feel if you do this?
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 11 --

When you get hooked
Animal makes decision when you are triggered. Your brain gets hijacked into
survival.
Spiritual state you can feel calm and loving.
Get out of animal state by teasing. Physical gestures, tongue out, hand holding.
Couple should practice again. This is a what to do system not an automatic
system.
Put your hand on your heart again and think of a time you were tested by the
other.
Coach reinforce when a woman will need you. When she will test you. All the
time.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 11 --

Back to Heart
Close eyes, feel heart, breathe into it. Feel its beauty, strength,
feel proud of it.
Remember a moment you were grateful for as a child or adult
it doesn’t matter. Feel that moment as if you were there. Find
another moment. Then find a third moment. Feel the power of
grattitude. After two minutes ask yourself a question, “What is
the truth? What do I need to know in my heart. All I need to
do is what? And open your eyes and look at each other.”
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 11 --

Sharing what the truth is
Let each person speak what there truth is.
What was their hook or test that they thought.
What they need to remind themselves and the other.
Question to man: What do you have in her?
What do you need to do for her?
Ask each how they break the pattern?
Remind Man he needs to get present. Remind him how to get into state.
